about.title: We create worlds through
about.description: We are an independent studio focused on transforming creativity into digital experiences. We believe every project deserves visibility, growth, and a space to show its potential.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To create games and projects that empower talent by building experiences and portfolios within the industry.

values.title: Values
values.description: Creativity, collaboration, and constant learning are part of every line of code and every pixel created.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be a space where ideas come to life and new creators find opportunities to grow.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Do you have any questions or want to join the BitBelow universe? Send a message.
contact.socialPrompt: Follow our social media and send us a message

footer.text: © 2026 BitBelow Game Studio | Creating worlds, one bit at a time.
